content: Native <dialog> element (Baseline since March 2022, ~96% global support) is the recommended lightweight confirmation-dialog pattern for a no-component-library Tailwind codebase: call dialogRef.current.showModal() to open (built-in focus trap, Escape-to-close, ::backdrop styling, correct ARIA semantics) and .close() to dismiss; a <form method='dialog'> for the Cancel button avoids extra JS. No external dependency needed, consistent with this project's hand-rolled Tailwind UI-SPEC decision (no shadcn).
